description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a prominent front sight post and a rear sight, both made of metal, for aiming. The barrel is standard length and extends from the wooden handguard, ending in a simple muzzle device. The trigger, trigger guard, and magazine release are all visible and constructed from metal. The wood components have a natural brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of rifles used in urban and military environments.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. Features iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle, front sight post, and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, magazine, and the receiver's details.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the buttstock, rear sight, and the straight alignment of the rifle's body.
